targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    argMax(label, updated_at) AS label,
    argMax(latitude, updated_at) AS latitude,
    argMax(longitude, updated_at) AS longitude
  FROM crowd_check.camera_nodes
  GROUP BY node_id
),
selected_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    label,
    latitude,
    longitude
  FROM latest_nodes
  WHERE label IN (${Bus_Stop_Name:sqlstring})
),
latest_detection_ts AS (
  SELECT
    d.node_id,
    max(d.timestamp) AS latest_timestamp
  FROM crowd_check.detections AS d
  INNER JOIN selected_nodes ON selected_nodes.node_id = d.node_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(d.timestamp)
  GROUP BY d.node_id
),
latest_tier_counts AS (
  SELECT
    d.node_id,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 1) AS tier_1_count,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 2) AS tier_2_count,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 3) AS tier_3_count
  FROM crowd_check.detections AS d
  INNER JOIN latest_detection_ts
    ON latest_detection_ts.node_id = d.node_id
   AND latest_detection_ts.latest_timestamp = d.timestamp
  GROUP BY d.node_id
),
latest_counts AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    (tier_1_count + tier_2_count + tier_3_count) AS total_detection_count
  FROM latest_tier_counts
)
SELECT
  selected_nodes.label AS name,
  selected_nodes.latitude AS latitude,
  selected_nodes.longitude AS longitude,
  latest_counts.total_detection_count AS value,
  latest_counts.total_detection_count AS total_detection_count
FROM latest_counts
INNER JOIN selected_nodes ON selected_nodes.node_id = latest_counts.node_id
ARRAY JOIN range(greatest(1, least(20, latest_counts.total_detection_count))) AS heat_repeat
WHERE latest_counts.total_detection_count > 0
ORDER BY total_detection_count DESC, name

WITH latest_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    argMax(label, updated_at) AS label,
    argMax(latitude, updated_at) AS latitude,
    argMax(longitude, updated_at) AS longitude
  FROM crowd_check.camera_nodes
  GROUP BY node_id
),
selected_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    label,
    latitude,
    longitude
  FROM latest_nodes
  WHERE label IN (${Bus_Stop_Name:sqlstring})
),
latest_detection_ts AS (
  SELECT
    d.node_id,
    max(d.timestamp) AS latest_timestamp
  FROM crowd_check.detections AS d
  INNER JOIN selected_nodes ON selected_nodes.node_id = d.node_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(d.timestamp)
  GROUP BY d.node_id
),
latest_tier_counts AS (
  SELECT
    d.node_id,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 1) AS tier_1_count,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 2) AS tier_2_count,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 3) AS tier_3_count
  FROM crowd_check.detections AS d
  INNER JOIN latest_detection_ts
    ON latest_detection_ts.node_id = d.node_id
   AND latest_detection_ts.latest_timestamp = d.timestamp
  GROUP BY d.node_id
),
latest_counts AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    tier_1_count,
    tier_2_count,
    tier_3_count,
    greatest(tier_1_count, tier_2_count, tier_3_count) AS dominant_count,
    multiIf(
      tier_3_count >= tier_2_count AND tier_3_count >= tier_1_count, 3,
      tier_2_count >= tier_1_count, 2,
      1
    ) AS dominant_tier,
    (tier_1_count + tier_2_count + tier_3_count) AS total_detection_count
  FROM latest_tier_counts
)
SELECT
  selected_nodes.label AS name,
  selected_nodes.latitude AS latitude,
  selected_nodes.longitude AS longitude,
  coalesce(latest_counts.total_detection_count, 0) AS value,
  coalesce(latest_counts.total_detection_count, 0) AS total_detection_count,
  coalesce(latest_counts.dominant_tier, 0) AS dominant_tier,
  coalesce(latest_counts.dominant_count, 0) AS dominant_count,
  coalesce(latest_counts.tier_1_count, 0) AS tier_1_count,
  coalesce(latest_counts.tier_2_count, 0) AS tier_2_count,
  coalesce(latest_counts.tier_3_count, 0) AS tier_3_count
FROM selected_nodes
LEFT JOIN latest_counts ON selected_nodes.node_id = latest_counts.node_id
ORDER BY total_detection_count DESC, name

WITH latest_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    argMax(label, updated_at) AS label
  FROM crowd_check.camera_nodes
  GROUP BY node_id
),
selected_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    label
  FROM latest_nodes
  WHERE label IN (${Bus_Stop_Name:sqlstring})
)
SELECT
  $__timeInterval(fs.timestamp) AS time,
  selected_nodes.label AS metric,
  avg(fs.total_headcount) AS value
FROM crowd_check.frame_summary AS fs
INNER JOIN selected_nodes ON selected_nodes.node_id = fs.node_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(fs.timestamp)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time, metric

WITH latest_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    argMax(label, updated_at) AS label
  FROM crowd_check.camera_nodes
  GROUP BY node_id
),
selected_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    label
  FROM latest_nodes
  WHERE label IN (${Bus_Stop_Name:sqlstring})
)
SELECT
  $__timeInterval(fs.timestamp) AS time,
  selected_nodes.label AS metric,
  avg(fs.body_count) AS value
FROM crowd_check.frame_summary AS fs
INNER JOIN selected_nodes ON selected_nodes.node_id = fs.node_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(fs.timestamp)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time, metric

WITH latest_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    argMax(label, updated_at) AS label
  FROM crowd_check.camera_nodes
  GROUP BY node_id
),
selected_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    label
  FROM latest_nodes
  WHERE label IN (${Bus_Stop_Name:sqlstring})
)
SELECT
  $__timeInterval(fs.timestamp) AS time,
  selected_nodes.label AS metric,
  avg(fs.head_count) AS value
FROM crowd_check.frame_summary AS fs
INNER JOIN selected_nodes ON selected_nodes.node_id = fs.node_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(fs.timestamp)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time, metric

WITH latest_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    argMax(label, updated_at) AS label
  FROM crowd_check.camera_nodes
  GROUP BY node_id
),
selected_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    label
  FROM latest_nodes
  WHERE label IN (${Bus_Stop_Name:sqlstring})
),
tier_counts_by_timestamp AS (
  SELECT
    d.timestamp,
    d.node_id,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 1) AS tier_1_count,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 2) AS tier_2_count,
    countIf(d.congestion_tier = 3) AS tier_3_count
  FROM crowd_check.detections AS d
  INNER JOIN selected_nodes ON selected_nodes.node_id = d.node_id
  WHERE $__timeFilter(d.timestamp)
  GROUP BY d.timestamp, d.node_id
),
selected_tier_totals_by_timestamp AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp,
    sum(tier_1_count) AS tier_1_total,
    sum(tier_2_count) AS tier_2_total,
    sum(tier_3_count) AS tier_3_total
  FROM tier_counts_by_timestamp
  GROUP BY timestamp
),
average_tier_totals AS (
  SELECT
    coalesce(avg(tier_1_total), 0) AS tier_1_avg,
    coalesce(avg(tier_2_total), 0) AS tier_2_avg,
    coalesce(avg(tier_3_total), 0) AS tier_3_avg
  FROM selected_tier_totals_by_timestamp
)
SELECT
  tier_name,
  tier_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    'Tier 1' AS tier_name,
    tier_1_avg AS tier_count,
    1 AS sort_order
  FROM average_tier_totals

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'Tier 2' AS tier_name,
    tier_2_avg AS tier_count,
    2 AS sort_order
  FROM average_tier_totals

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    'Tier 3' AS tier_name,
    tier_3_avg AS tier_count,
    3 AS sort_order
  FROM average_tier_totals
)
ORDER BY sort_order

list.definition:
WITH latest_nodes AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    argMax(label, updated_at) AS label
  FROM crowd_check.camera_nodes
  GROUP BY node_id
)
SELECT DISTINCT label
FROM latest_nodes
ORDER BY label
list.label: Bus Stop
list.name: Bus_Stop_Name
